question:
If 2% of x = 360, then x is equal to:
मदद x का 2%, 360 वै, तॉ x का भान ज्ञात कीजिए।
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
What is 20% of 40% of 30% of 75% of 3400?
3400 के 75% के 30% के 40% के 20% का भान क्या वॉगा?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
By how much is 65% of 65 greater than of 45?
65 का 65%, 45 के ऴे ककतना अधधक वै?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
If 35% of k is 20 less than 1200% of 25, then k is:
मदद k का 35%, 25 के 1200% ऴ े 20 कभ वै, तॉ k का भान क् मा वै?
(RPF CONSTABLE 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
What is the square root of 144%?
144% का ऱगगभूर क्या वै ?
(SSC GD 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
2% of 50% of a number is what percentage of that number?
ककऴी ऴंख्या के 50% का 2% उऴ ऴंख्या का ककतना प्रधतलत वॉगा?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
1% of 96% of a number is what percentage of that number?
ककऴी ऴंख्या के 96% का 1%, उऴ ऴंख्या का ककतना प्रधतलत वै?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
Two numbers are respectively 30% and 18% more than a third number. The ratio
of the two numbers is:

दॉ ऴंख्याएं एक तीऴयी ऴंख्या ऴे क्रभलः 30% औय 18% अधधक वैं। उन दॉनों ऴंख्याओ ं का अनुऩात
ज्ञात कीजिए।
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
5% of a = b, then b% of 20 is the same as ______
a का 5% = b तॉ 20 का b% _____ के फयाफय वॉगा।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
If x% of a is the same as y% of b, then z% of b will be
मदद a का x%, b के y% के ऴभान वै, तॉ b का z% वॉगा
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
If 85% of (x − y) = 25% of (x + y), Then y is what percentage of x?
मदद (x-y) का 85% = (x + y) का 25% वै, तॉ y, x का ककतना प्रधतलत वै?
(SSC GD 2023)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
Two numbers A and B are such that the sum of 8% of A and 5% of B is three-fifth of
the sum of 12% of A and 10% of B. The ratio of A and B is:
A औय B दॉ ऴंख्याए इऴ प्रकाय वैं कक A के 8% औयै B के 5% का मॉग, A के 12% औय B के 10% के मॉग
का 3/5 बाग वै। A औय B का अनुऩात ककतना वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
The population of a town is increased from 60,000 to 61,050. How much is the
percentage increase?
ककऴी कस्ब े की िनऴंख्या 60,000 ऴ े फढ़कय 61,050 वॉ िाती वै। ऱृद्धि प्रधतलत ककतना वै?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
Monthly expenditure of Ritvik decreases from ₹12,800 to ₹11,712. Find the
percentage decrease in his expenditure.
ऋत्विक का भाजऴक खर्ग ₹12,800 ऴे घटकय ₹11,712 वॉ गमा। उऴके व्यम भें प्रधतलत कभी ज्ञात
कीजिमे।
(SSC CHSL 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
The present cost of a house is ₹1,23,016. After a year, its cost will increase to
₹1,40,203. The percentage increase (rounded off to the nearest integer) in the
cost of the house is:
ककऴी भकान की ऱतगभान रागत ₹1,23,016 वै। एक ऱळ ग फाद, इऴकी रागत फढ़कय ₹1,40,203 वॉ
िाएगी। भकान की रागत प्रधतलत ऱृद्धि (जनकटतभ ऩूर्ाांक तक ऩूर्ाांककत) ज्ञात कीजिए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
The present cost of a plot area is ₹1,12,079. After a year, its cost increased to
₹1,89,297. The percentage increase (rounded off to the nearest integer) in the
cost of the plot area is:
ककऴी बूखंड क्षेत्र की ऱतगभान कीभत ₹1,12,079 वै। एक ऱळ ग फाद, इऴकी कीभत फढ़कय ₹1,89,297 वॉ
गई। बूखंड क्षेत्र की कीभत भ ें प्रधतलत ऱृद्धि (जनकटतभ ऩूर्ाकां तक ऩूर्ाांककत) ज्ञात कीजिए।
(RRB NTPC 12TH LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
The monthly income of Amara is ₹80,200. If her income is decreased by 11%, then
find her new monthly income (in ₹).
अभाया की भाजऴक आम ₹80,200 वै। मदद उऴकी आम 11% कभ वॉ िाती वै, तॉ उऴकी नई भाजऴक
आम (₹ भें) ज्ञात कीजिए।
(RRB NTPC 12TH LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
The monthly income of a person is ₹7,540. If their income is increased by 20%,
then what will be their new monthly income?
ककऴी व्यक्ति की भाजऴक आम ₹7,540 वै। मदद उऴकी आम भें 20% की ऱृद्धि वॉती वै, तॉ उऴकी नई
भाजऴक आम ककतनी वॉगी?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A number when increased by 50 %', gives 3720. The number is:
एक ऴंख्या कॉ 50% फढ़ाने ऩय 3720 प्राप्त वॉता वै। ऴंख्या वै:
(RRB RPF SI 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A number when increased by 40 %', gives 3570. The number is:
एक ऴंख्मा भें 40 % की ऱृद्धि कयने ऩय 3570 प्राऩ्त वॉता वै। ऱव ऴंख्मा ______वै।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A number, when decreased by 7%, gives 3720. The number is:
ककऴी ऴंख्या भें 7% की कभी कयने ऩय 3720 प्राप्त वॉता वै। ऱव ऴंख्या ज्ञात कीजिए।
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A number, when increased by 60%, gives 3570. The number is:
एक ऴंख्या भें 60% की ऱृद्धि कयने ऩय 3570 प्राप्त वॉता वै। ऱव ऴंख्या ज्ञात कीजिए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A number when increased by , gives 378. Then number is:
एक ऴंख्या कॉ फढ़ान े ऩय ऱव 378 वॉ िाती वै। ऱव ऴंख्या ज्ञात कीजिए।
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Gursimar was given an increment of 15% on her salary. If her new salary is
₹84,180, what was her salary before the increment?
गुयजऴभय के ऱेतन भ ें 15% की ऱृद्धि हुई। मदद उऴका नमा ऱेतन ₹84,180 वै, तॉ ऱेतन ऱृद्धि ऴ े ऩूऱग उऴका
ऱेतन ककतना था?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A bulb manufacturing company found that 11% of their total output was wasted.
If the number of correct products is 4984, then find the number of defective
products?
एक फल्ब जनभागता कं ऩनी ने ऩामा कक उनके कु र उत्पाद का 11% बाग खयाफ जनकर गमा| मदद ऴवी
उत्पादों की ऴंख्या 4984 वै, तॉ ख़याफ उत्पादों की ऴंख्या ज्ञात कीजिए ?
RPF S.I. 19/12/2018 (Evening)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
If house tax is paid before the due date, one gets a reduction of 12% on the
amount of the bill. By paying the tax before the due date, a person got a
reduction of ₹ 2,100. The amount (in ₹) of house tax paid was:
जनमत धतक्तथ ऴे ऩूऱग, गृव कय का बुगतान कयने ऱारे कॉ कफर की याजल ऩय 12% की छू ट जभरती वै। एक
व्यक्ति कॉ जनमत धतक्तथ ऴे ऩूऱग बुगतान कयके ऩय ₹2,100 की छू ट जभरी। बुगतान की गई गृव कय की
याजल (₹ भें) ज्ञात कय।ें
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
After 57 litres of petrol was poured into an empty storage tank, it was still 1%
empty. How much petrol (in litres, rounded off to two decimal place) must be
poured into the storage tank in order to fill it?
एक खारी बंडायर् टैंक भें 57 रीटय ऩेट्रॉर डारने के फाद बी मव 1% खारी यव गमा था। बंडायर् टैंक
कॉ बयन े के जरए उऴभें ककतना ऩेट्रॉर (रीटय भें, दॉ दलभरऱ स्थान तक ऩूर्ाांककत) डारना वॉगा?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
When a number is increased by 216, it becomes 140% of itself. What is the
number?
िफ ककऴी ऴंख्या कॉ 216 ऴ े फढ़ामा िाता वै, तॉ मव स्वमं की 140% वॉ िाती वै। ऱव ऴंख्या क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
If 25% of a number is added to 72, then the result is the same number. 70% of the
same number is:
मदद ककऴी ऴंख्या का 25%, 72 भ ें िॉडा िाए, तॉ ऩरयर्ाभ ऱवी ऴंख्या वै। ऴभान ऴंख्या का 70% वै:
(RRB RPF SI 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
The difference between a number increased by 17% and the same number
decreased by 18% is 28. Find the number.
एक ऴंख्या भें 17% की ऱृद्धि ऴ े प्राप्त ऴंख्या तथा उऴी ऴंख्या भें 18% की कभी ऴे प्राप्त ऴंख्या के फीर् 28
का अंतय वै। ऴंख्या ज्ञात कीजिए।
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
The difference of two positive number is 1020. If 7.6% of the greater number is
12.4% of the smaller number, then the sum of two numbers is equal to:
दॉ धनात्भक ऴंख्माओ ंका अंतय 1020 वै। मदद फडी ऴंख्मा का 7.6% छॉटी ऴंख्मा का 12.4% वै, तॉ
दॉनों ऴंख्माओ ंका मॉगपर ............... के फयाफय वॉगा।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
The sum of two numbers is 5635. If the bigger number is decreased by 7% and the
smaller number is increased by 24%, then the numbers obtained are equal. The
bigger number is
दॉ ऴंख्याओ ंका मॉग 5635 वै। मदद फडी ऴंख्या भें 7% की कभी हुई वै औय छॉटी ऴंख्या भें 24% की ऱृद्धि
हुई वै, तॉ प्राप्त ऴंख्याएं फयाफय वैं। फडी ऴंख्या वै
SSC CHSL TIER – I 2022
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The income of A is 25% more than that of B and the income of C is 65% less than
the sum of the incomes of A and B. Income of C is what percent less than the
income of A?
A की आम B की तुरना भ ें 25% अधधक वै औय C की आम A औय B की आम के मॉग ऴे 65% कभ वै C
की आम A की आम ऴे ककतने प्रधतलत कभ वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
The income of A is 30% less than the income of B and the income of B is 137.5%
more than that of C. If the income of A is Rs. 28500 less than that of B, than
income (in Rs.) of C is:
A की आम, B आम ऴे 30% कभ वै औय B की आम C की आम ऴे 137.5% अधधक वै। मदद A की आम B
की आम ऴ े रु 28,500 कभ वै, तॉ C की आम (Rs. भें) ज्ञात कय।ें
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
If (x+20)% of 250 is 25% more than x% of 220, then 10% of (x+50) is what per cent
less than 15% of x?
मदद 250 का (x+20)%, 220 के x% ऴ े 25% अधधक वै, तॉ (x+50) का 10%, x के 15% ऴे ककतने
प्रधतलत कभ वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A number is increased by x%; to get back to the original number, it is to be reduced by
एक ऴंख्या भें x% की ऱृद्धि हुई वै; भूर ऴंख्या ऩय ऱाऩऴ िान े के जरए, इऴे कभ कयना ऩडेगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A number is mistakenly multiplied by 7/5 instead of being multiplied by 3/2 . What is
the percentage change in the result due to this mistake?
ककऴी ऴंख्या कॉ ऴ े गुर्ा कयने के फिाम गरती ऴे ऴे गुर्ा ककमा िाता वै। इऴ गरती के कायर्
ऩरयर्ाभ भें प्रधतलत ऩरयऱतगन ज्ञात कय।ें
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Amit's income is 30% more than Raj’s income. What percentage of Raj’s income is less
than Amit's income?
अजभत की आम, याि की आम ऴे 30% अधधक वै। याि की आम, अजभत की आम ऴे ककतन े प्रधतलत कभ वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
If A's salary is 16% more than that of B, then by what percentage is B's salary less
than that of A (correct to two decimal places)?
मदद A का ऱेतन B ऴे 16% अधधक वै, तॉ B का ऱेतन A ऴे ककतन े प्रधतलत (दॉ दलभरऱ स्थानों तक)
कभ वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
If A’s height is 8% greater than B’s height, then in what percentage B’s height is
less than A’s height?
मदद A की ऊं र्ाई B की ऊं र्ाई ऴ े 8% अधधक वै, तॉ B की ऊं र्ाई A की ऊं र्ाई ऴ े ककतन े प्रधतलत कभ वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
If A’s income is 60% less than B’s income then B’s income is what percentage
more than that of A’s income?
मदद A की आम, B की आम ऴे 60% कभ वै तॉ B की आम, A की आम ऴे ककतन े प्रधतलत अधधक वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
Due to decrease in manpower, the production in a factory decreases by 12%. By
what percentage (rounded off to two decimal places) should the working hours
be increased to restore the original production?
िनलक्ति भें कभी के कायर्, एक कायखान े भें उत्पादन 12% कभ वॉ िाता वै। भूर उत्पादन कॉ फवार
कयने के जरए काम ग घंटों कॉ ककतने प्रधतलत (दॉ दलभरऱ स्थानों तक ऩूर्ाांककत) फढ़ामा िाना
र्ारवए?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
When water freezes to ice its volume increases 10%. If this ice melts, then how
much percentages will the volume decrease?
िफ ऩानी िभकय फपग फन िाता वै तॉ उऴका आमतन 10% फढ़ िाता वै। मदद ऱव फपग कऩघर िामे तॉ
आमतन ककतने प्रधतलत कभ वॉ िामेगा?
(CISF HCM 2023)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
The price of oil has increased by 35%. By what percentage should the increased
price of oil be reduced so that the price of oil remains the same
तेर की कीभत भें 35% की ऱृद्धि हुई वै। तेर की फढ़ी हुई कीभत कॉ ककतने प्रधतलत तक कभ ककमा
िाना र्ारवए ताकक तेर की कीभत ऴभान फनी यवे?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
The price of sugar increased by 22.5%. Anita wants to keep her expenditure on
sugar same as before. By what percentage must she reduce her consumption of
sugar (correct to two place of decimals)?
र्ीनी के भूल्य भें 22.5% की ऱृद्धि वॉती वै। अनीता र्ीनी ऩय अऩने ऱ्मम कॉ ऩवरे जितना वी यखना
र्ावती वैं। उऴ े र्ीनी की खऩत ककतने प्रधतलत कभ कयनी र्ारवए? (दॉ दलभरऱ स्थानों तक
ऩूर्ाांककत)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
The price of LPG cylinder has increased from Rs 656 to Rs 820. What percentage
of consumption should be reduced so that the amount spent on LPG cylinders
remained the same (in %)?
LPG जऴरेंडय की कीभत 656 रुऩमे ऴे फढ़कय 820 रुऩमे वॉ गई वै। खऩत का ककतना प्रधतलत कभ
ककमा िाना र्ारवए ताकक LPG जऴरेंडय ऩय खर्ग की िान े ऱारी याजल ऴभान (% भें) यवे?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
The price of rice falls by 35%. How much extra quantity of rice can be bought with
the money that was sufficient to buy 104 kg of rice previously?
र्ाऱर की कीभत भ ें 35% की क्तगयाऱट आती वै। ज्ञात कय ें उतने वी रुऩए भें र्ाऱर की ककतनी अधतरयि
भात्रा खयीदी िा ऴकती वै िॉ ऩवरे 104 ककरॉ र्ाऱर खयीदने के जरए ऩमाप्तग था?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A contractor reduces the working time of a week (Monday to Saturday) from 48
hours to 36 hours for his workers without changing the payment. What is the
percentage increase in the hourly rate?
एक ठे के दाय बुगतान की यश्मि भें ऩरयऱतगन ककए कफना अऩने श्रजभकों के जरए एक ऴप्ताव (ऴॉभऱाय
ऴे लजनऱाय) के काम ग के ऴभम कॉ 48 घंटे ऴे घटाकय 36 घंटे कय देता वै। प्रधत घंटा बुगतान की याजल भें
प्रधतलत ऱृद्धि क्या वै?
(SSC MTS 2023)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
The price of rice increase from Rs. 45 per kg to Rs, 63 per kg. If its consumption is
reduced by 20%, then what percent does the expenditure on it increase?
र्ाऱर के दाभ 45 रुऩमे प्रधत ककरॉ ऴे फढ़कय 63 रुऩमे प्रधत ककरॉ वॉ गए वैं। मदद इऴकी खऩत भें
20% की कभी कय दी िाए, तॉ इऴ ऩय वॉने ऱारा व्यम ककतन े प्रधतलत फढ़ िाएगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
The price (per litre) of petrol increases by 75%. By what percent should its
consumption be reduced such that the expenditure on it increases by 26% only?
ऩेट्रॉर के भूल्य भ ें (प्रधत रीटय) 75% की ऱृद्धि वॉती वै। इऴकी खऩत भें ककतने प्रधतलत की कभी कय दी
िाए कक इऴ ऩय वॉने ऱारे व्यम भ ें के ऱर 26% की ऱृद्धि वॉ?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A reduction of 20% in the price of sugar enables a purchase to obtain 2.5 kg more
for Rs. 160. The original price per kg of sugar is?
र्ीनी की कीभत भें 20% की कभी ऴे खयीदायी ऩय 160 रुऩमे भें 2.5 ककरॉग्राभ अधधक प्राप्त ककमा िा
ऴकता वै। प्रधत ककरॉग्राभ र्ीनी की भूर कीभत क्या वै?
(RRB ALP 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A reduction of 15% in the price of washing powder enables a purchaser to obtain
5 kg more for Rs.1,275. The original price of the washing powder per kg is:
ऱाजलिंग ऩाउडय की कीभत भें 15% की कभी ऴ े खयीदाय 1,275 रुऩमे भें 5 ककरॉग्राभ अधधक प्राप्त कय
ऴकता वै। ऱाजलिंग ऩाउडय की भूर भूल्य प्रधत ककरॉग्राभ ज्ञात कीजिम:े
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
Due to increase of 32% in the price of pulse, a person reduces his consumption in
such a way that his expenditure increases only by 10%. If he consumes 150kg of
pulse after the price has increased then how much pulse was consumed by him
initially?
दार के भूल्य भ े 32% की ऱृद्धि के कायर् एक व्यक्ति अऩने उऩबॉग भे इऴ प्रकाय कभी कयता वै ताकक
उऴके खर् ग भे के ऱर 10% कक ऱृद्धि वॉ मदद भूल्य फढ्ने के ऩश्चात ऱव 150kg दार का उऩबॉग कयता वै
तॉ ज्ञात ककजिम े प्रायम्भ भ े उऴन े ककतन े kg दार का उऩबॉग ककमा था?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A man’s annual income has increased by Rs.1.2 lakhs but the tax on income that
he has to pay has reduced from 12% to 10%. He now pays the same amount of tax
as before. What is his increased income (in Rs. lakhs)?
एक व्यक्ति की ऱाकळिक आम भ ें 1.2 राख रु की ऱृद्धि वॉती वै ऩयन्त ु आम ऩय रगन े ऱारा कय 12% ऴ े 10% वॉ िाता
वै। अबी बी ऱव उतना वी कय देता वै जितना ऩवरे देता था। उऴकी फढ़ी हुई आम (राख रु भ)ें ककतनी वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
Was found to have 6% salt. What was the percentage of salt in the original
solution?

दऴ रीटय कऱरमन ऴे 2 रीटय ऩानी ऱात्वित वॉ गमा। लेळ कऱरमन भें 6% नभक ऩामा गमा।
ऱास्तकऱक कऱरमन भें नभक का प्रधतलत ककतना था ?
RRB NTPC 29/12/2020 (Evening)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A solution contains 16% of salt, from which 18 ltr of water is evaporated. Now
concentration of salt in solution becomes 28%. Find the initial quantity of
solution?
एक घॉर भें 16% नभक वै, जिऴभें ऴे 18 रीटय ऩानी का ऱािीकयर् वॉ िाता वै। अफ घॉर भें नभक
की ऴांद्रता 28% वै। कऱरमन की प्रायजं बक भात्रा ककतनी थी?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
How much water should be added to 1440ml of a 38% sugar solution so that it
becomes a 17.1% sugar solution ?
38% र्ीनी के घॉर के 1440 जभरीरीटय भें ककतना ऩानी जभराना र्ारवए ताकक मव 17.1% र्ीनी का
घॉर फन िाए?
Level 2 (13/06/2022) Shift 1
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
In a triangle base is increased by %, then by how much % height should be
reduced such that area of triangle remains constant?
एक धत्रबुि आधाय भें % की ऱृद्धि की िाती वै। इऴ प्रकाय धत्रबुि का क्षेत्रपर स्थस्थय यवन े ऴ े
ककतनी% ऊँ र्ाई कभ वॉनी र्ारवए?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
If the length of a rectangle is increased by 11.11%, then by how much percentage
its breadth should be reduced to keep te area same?
मदद एक आमत की रंफाई 11.11% फढ़ा दी िाए, तॉ क्षेत्रपर ऴभान यखने के जरए इऴकी र्ॊडाई ककतन े
प्रधतलत कभ की िानी र्ारवए?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
In a cuboid, if length is increased by 20% and breath is decreased by 10%, by how
percentage the height should be increased/decreased so that volume remains
constant?
एक घनाब भें, मदद रंफाई 20% फढ़ाई िाती वै औय र्ॊडाई 10% तक घटाई िाती वै, तॉ उर्ाई कॉ ककतने
प्रधतलत फढ़ामा /घटामा िाना र्ारवए ताकक आमतन स्थस्थय यवे?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
If the radius of the cylinder is decreased by 20%, then by how much percent the
height must be increased, so that the volume of the cylinder remains same?
मदद फेरन की धत्रज्या भें 20% की कभी की िाती वै, तॉ उऴकी ऊँ र्ाई भें ककतने प्रधतलत की ऱृद्धि
कयनी र्ारवए ताकक फेरन का आमतन ऴभान यवे?
(CGL 2017)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
The length and breadth of a cuboid is increased by 20% and 25%, respectively,
while its height is reduced by 30%. What must be the total percentage
increase/decrease in the volume of the cuboid?
एक घनाब की रंफाई औय र्ॊडाई भ ें क्रभलः 20% औय 25% की ऱृद्धि की िाती वै, िफकक इऴकी ऊं र्ाई
भें 30% की कभी की िाती वै। घनाब के आमतन भें कु र प्रधतलत ऱृद्धि/कभी ककतनी वॉनी र्ारवए?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].
